name: [CTI] Forgejo MCP Bridge
_doc: Two-workflow template: sub-workflow handles individual tool calls against the forgejo-mcp SSE server; server workflow exposes all tools as an MCP server endpoint for the yaoc2 Brain to consume.

parameters.content:
## CTI Forgejo MCP Server

This workflow exposes the sub-workflow as an MCP server endpoint.
The yaoc2 Brain connects to this via SSE to call Forgejo tools.

**Tools exposed:** forgejo_create_issue, forgejo_update_issue,
forgejo_create_or_update_file, forgejo_get_file,
forgejo_create_pull_request, forgejo_dispatch_workflow,
forgejo_list_workflow_runs, forgejo_list_notifications

**Connection:** Brain AI Agent → MCP Client node → this workflow's SSE endpoint
